# BroadTrack model weights

The original BroadTrack repository tracks `*.pt` files with Git LFS. This monorepo does not vendor those binaries.

After cloning this repository, download the released model files from the upstream BroadTrack project and place them in this folder as:

- `nbjw_keypoint_model.pt`
- `tvcalib_model.pt`

Use the instructions in the upstream `README.md` in this `third_party/BroadTrack` directory.
